_comment:
Deterministic message triggers. When a user's message matches, Clawy posts one of the listed media keys (referenced from media_pool.json) WITHOUT calling the LLM. Per-trigger fields:
  name              unique label, used for cooldown keying and logs
  type              'word' (case-insensitive, full-word match) or 'regex' (raw pattern)
  patterns          list of strings — ANY match fires the trigger
  media             list of media-pool keys — randomly picked when multiple
  cooldown_seconds  per (trigger, channel) cooldown; 0 = no cooldown (not recommended)
  reply_to_user     true = post as a reply to the user's message (recommended)
  case_sensitive    regex-only; word triggers are always case-insensitive
  description       optional, shown by `!triggers` listing
Triggers are evaluated in config order; the first match per message fires.
